<?php use App\Models\User; test('users can authenticate using the login screen', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $response = $this->post('/login', [ 'email' => $user->email, 'password' => 'password', ]); $this->assertAuthenticated(); $response->assertNoContent(); }); test('users can not authenticate with invalid password', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $this->post('/login', [ 'email' => $user->email, 'password' => 'wrong-password', ]); $this->assertGuest(); }); test('users can logout', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $response = $this->actingAs($user)->post('/logout'); $this->assertGuest(); $response->assertNoContent(); });
